inputs.label: Current Energy Usage (kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Total energy consumption in the baseline period (e.g., monthly).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total energy consumption in the baseline period (e.g., monthly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Baz dönemdeki (örneğin aylık) toplam enerji tüketimi.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation totale d'énergie sur la période de référence (ex. mensuelle).
businessContext_i18n.es: Consumo total de energía en el período base (ej. mensual).

inputs.label: Energy Cost per kWh ($)
inputs.businessContext: Cost per kilowatt-hour from the utility bill or energy contract.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cost per kilowatt-hour from the utility bill or energy contract.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Fatura veya enerji sözleşmesinden kilovat-saat başına maliyet.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kosten pro Kilowattstunde aus der Stromrechnung oder dem Energievertrag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût par kilowattheure d'après la facture d'électricité ou le contrat énergétique.
businessContext_i18n.es: Coste por kilovatio-hora según la factura de servicios o contrato energético.

inputs.label: Efficiency Improvement (%)
inputs.businessContext: Expected percentage reduction in energy usage due to conservation measures.

businessContext_i18n.en: Expected percentage reduction in energy usage due to conservation measures.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tasarruf önlemleri nedeniyle enerji kullanımında beklenen yüzde azalma.
businessContext_i18n.de: Erwartete prozentuale Reduzierung des Energieverbrauchs durch Sparmaßnahmen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de réduction attendu de la consommation d'énergie grâce aux mesures de conservation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje esperado de reducción en el uso de energía debido a medidas de conservación.

inputs.label: Operating Hours per Period
inputs.businessContext: Total operating hours in the analysis period (e.g., 720 hours per month).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total operating hours in the analysis period (e.g., 720 hours per month).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Analiz dönemindeki toplam çalışma saati (örneğin ayda 720 saat).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtbetriebsstunden im Analysezeitraum (z. B. 720 Stunden pro Monat).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'heures de fonctionnement sur la période d'analyse (ex. 720 heures par mois).
businessContext_i18n.es: Horas totales de operación en el período de análisis (ej. 720 horas al mes).

inputs.label: CO₂ Emission Factor (kg/kWh)
inputs.businessContext: Carbon dioxide emission per kWh for the energy source (e.g., grid average).

businessContext_i18n.en: Carbon dioxide emission per kWh for the energy source (e.g., grid average).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Enerji kaynağı için kilovat-saat başına karbondioksit emisyonu (örneğin şebeke ortalaması).
businessContext_i18n.de: Kohlendioxidemission pro kWh für die Energiequelle (z. B. Netz-Durchschnitt).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Émission de dioxyde de carbone par kWh pour la source d'énergie (ex. moyenne du réseau).
businessContext_i18n.es: Emisión de dióxido de carbono por kWh para la fuente de energía (ej. promedio de la red).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
